title: 250 years of American independence: Trump praises US and attacks 'communists' at chaotic celebration
subhed: After over an hour's delay due to a heatwave and thunderstorms, Republican President Donald Trump, who made Independence Day into a celebration of his glory, gave a speech, under the rain, in which he claimed that 'America is back.'

title: Tehran sees crowds gather to pray on second day of funeral ceremonies for Iran's Ali Khamenei
subhed: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian attended the ceremony on Sunday, accompanied by Iranian allies and members of the team currently negotiating with the US after an initial ceasefire in the US-Israeli war against Iran.

title: Peruvian and Colombian presidential elections: Expatriate vote helps far right clinch victory
subhed: Peruvians living abroad helped Keiko Fujimori to win the presidency, even though only a minority of Peru's residents voted for her. Expatriate Colombians also massively backed Abelardo de la Espriella, though this was not as decisive.

title: To go or not? The dilemma for artists and authors invited to far-right-run cities
